name: End of the Garden Pickle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 1/2 cups salt with 2 quarts water and soak the cucumbers, celery, peppers, onions, tomatoes, and cabbage overnight.
2. Drain the vegetables well.
3. Cook the carrots and beans in boiling water until tender, then drain.
4. Mix 2 tablespoons mustard seeds, 2 tablespoons celery seeds, 2 cups vinegar, and 2 cups sugar in a pot.
5. Bring all ingredients to a boil for 10 minutes.
6. Pack the mixture into jars and seal them.
